# Robotics Directory

> Comprehensive static directory of robots with advanced search, category filtering, side-by-side comparison, and a guided finder.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/): The main catalog containing 1,000+ robots across 7 categories.
- [Robot Finder](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/finder/): Guided interactive recommendation wizard matching users to robots by purpose, budget, and specs.
- [Directory Statistics](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/stats/): Visual analytics, category distributions, price statistics, and manufacturer metrics.

## Categories

- [Humanoids](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=humanoid): Bipedal and wheeled human-like platforms for industrial, research, and companion use.
- [Quadrupeds](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=quadruped): Robodogs, wheeled-legged systems, and inspection crawlers.
- [Companion Robots](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=companion): Social robots, tabletop assistants, and robotic pets.
- [Cleaning Robots](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=cleaning): Autonomous vacuums, mops, commercial scrubbers, and industrial cleaners.
- [Outdoor Robots](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=outdoor): Robotic lawn mowers, snow clearers, pool cleaners, and sidewalk delivery systems.
- [Educational Robots](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=educational): MINT/STEM platforms, programmable arm kits, and toy/coding packages.
- [Smart Home](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/?category=smarthome): Delivery AMRs, automated flatbread/kitchen cooks, and telepresence systems.

## Data & Specifications

All robots have detailed specification sheets containing:
- Manufacturer and Model details
- Pricing (numeric/structured currencies)
- Physical properties (weight, size dimensions)
- Operational specs (battery life, runtime, speed, degrees of freedom, payload capacity, IP rating, terrain profiles)
- Interactive comparison links (compare up to 4 models side-by-side)

## Developer Resources

- [Sitemap](https://robodirectory.huskynarr.de/sitemap-index.xml): Index of all static pages and robot URL endpoints.
